tasks.subject: Task 0: Fix root-qualified anchors, normalize REPO_URL, add Zod
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make existing tests/landing-links.test.mjs pass without structural refactor. Fix two real bugs: bare #features anchors don't work from /dashboard, and repo URL case mismatch. Install zod in preparation for waitlist API.

**Files:**
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/package.json (add zod)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- All four menu items use root-qualified hashes (/#features, /#architecture, /#pricing, /#docs)
- repoUrl constant is https://github.com/Kaydenletk/SunShift (correct casing)
- zod@^3 installed
- pnpm build succeeds
- node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs passes

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs` → build OK, # pass 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["menu items use /#anchor form", "REPO_URL uses correct casing", "zod installed", "build passes", "landing-links test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Extract constants.ts (landing data module)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pull all landing-page data into src/components/landing/constants.ts. No JSX, no runtime. Update existing test to read from new location.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/constants.ts
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx (delete inline consts, import)
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/tests/landing-links.test.mjs (read from constants.ts)

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs` → build OK, # pass 3

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/constants.ts", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/tests/landing-links.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["constants.ts exports REPO_URL, menuItems, features, storyMoments, adrLinks, trustItems, riskStats, techBadges", "hero-section-1.tsx imports from constants", "test reads from new location and passes", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Extract LandingHeader.tsx (client component)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move fixed nav + mobile menu + scroll listener into its own client component. Zero behavior change.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/LandingHeader.tsx (with 'use client')
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx (delete HeroHeader, import LandingHeader)

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` succeeds; manual dev check — scroll fades header bg, mobile hamburger toggles menu, link click closes menu.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/LandingHeader.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["'use client' directive at top", "imports menuItems from constants", "scroll listener cleaned up in effect return", "mobile menu closes on link click", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Extract HeroSection.tsx and RealityCheckSection.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move above-the-fold hero and 3-stat reality check into server components. Visual parity required.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/RealityCheckSection.tsx
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` → success. Manual dev render matches pre-task state.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/HeroSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/RealityCheckSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["both are server components (no 'use client')", "HeroSection imports techBadges", "RealityCheckSection imports riskStats", "visual parity preserved", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Extract FeaturesSection.tsx with graceful-degrade card structure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move features into own server component AND restructure cards. Card body is <article>, not <Link>. GitHub URL becomes a small 'View source →' secondary link at card footer. If URL 404s, only the link breaks — card's content still lands.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/FeaturesSection.tsx
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` succeeds. Dev server: clicking card body does NOT navigate; only 'View source →' opens GitHub.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/FeaturesSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["cards render as <article>, not <Link>", "secondary <a> at card footer with ctaLabel + ArrowRight", "external links use target=_blank rel=noreferrer", "internal links (/) use <Link>", "three-pillar grouping preserved", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Extract ArchitectureSection.tsx with same card structure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move architecture (geographic callout + 3 story moments + trust strip + ADR pills + closer) into own component. Story moment cards follow same non-link-body pattern as features. ADR pills remain as <Link>.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/ArchitectureSection.tsx
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` succeeds; visual parity.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/ArchitectureSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["story moment cards are <article> (not Link)", "ADR pills remain as <Link>", "geographic callout preserved", "trust strip preserved", "section IDs preserved", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Extract PricingSection.tsx, DocsSection.tsx, LandingFooter.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Complete the per-section extraction with three small pure-presentational server components.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/PricingSection.tsx
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/DocsSection.tsx (uses REPO_URL from constants)
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/LandingFooter.tsx
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` → success; visual parity.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/PricingSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/DocsSection.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/LandingFooter.tsx", "sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all three are server components", "DocsSection uses REPO_URL constant", "Most Popular badge preserved on Business tier", "terminal mockup preserved", "footer has Sun icon + copyright + tagline", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire app/page.tsx to landing components, delete hero-section-1.tsx
tasks.description:
**Goal:** page.tsx composes landing components directly. Delete hero-section-1.tsx entirely. No imports pointing to the deleted file.

**Files:**
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/app/page.tsx
- Delete: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/hero-section-1.tsx
- Delete: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/blocks/ (empty directory)

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs` → build OK, # pass 3. No grep matches for `blocks/hero-section`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["page.tsx imports 9 landing components", "order: Header, Hero, RealityCheck, Features, Architecture, Pricing, Docs, Footer (Waitlist added in Task 11)", "hero-section-1.tsx deleted", "grep -rn 'blocks/hero-section' returns no matches", "landing-links test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Waitlist storage helper + Zod schema (TDD, unit tests)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** File-backed waitlist store with atomic writes, Zod schema. Pure logic, no Next.js runtime. TDD: tests first.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/waitlist-schema.ts
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/waitlist-storage.ts
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs
- Modify: .gitignore (add data/)
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/package.json (add tsx devDep)

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs` → 7+ tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/waitlist-schema.ts", "sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/waitlist-storage.ts", "sunshift/dashboard/tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs", ".gitignore", "sunshift/dashboard/package.json"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["waitlistEntrySchema validates email and lowercases", "loadWaitlist returns {entries:[]} on missing file", "appendToWaitlist writes atomically via .tmp + rename", "hasEmail is case-insensitive", "malformed JSON surfaces clear error", "data/ gitignored", "all 7 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Rate limiter + POST /api/waitlist route (TDD, integration tests)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Next.js App Router API route with in-memory rate limiter (5/hr per IP). Integration-tested against temp file via WAITLIST_FILE env override.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/rate-limit.ts
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/app/api/waitlist/route.ts
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs` → 5 tests pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/lib/rate-limit.ts", "sunshift/dashboard/src/app/api/waitlist/route.ts", "sunshift/dashboard/tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["valid email returns 200 {success:true}", "invalid email returns 400 INVALID_EMAIL", "duplicate returns 200 with 'already on the list' copy", "6th request from same IP returns 429 RATE_LIMITED", "malformed JSON returns 400 INVALID_EMAIL", "no stack traces leaked to client", "all 5 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: WaitlistCTA.tsx (client component with 4 form states)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** User-facing email form with idle/submitting/success/error states. Maps API error codes to friendly messages.

**Files:**
- Create: sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/WaitlistCTA.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build` succeeds. Manual dev test in Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/components/landing/WaitlistCTA.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["'use client' directive", "useState for email, status", "POST /api/waitlist with JSON body", "error codes mapped to friendly messages", "aria-invalid, aria-describedby for a11y", "role=status on success, role=alert on error", "button disabled during submit", "build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Wire WaitlistCTA into page.tsx + end-to-end smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Insert waitlist band between Pricing and Docs. Run dev server and submit form for real against actual API. Verify data/waitlist.json persists.

**Files:**
- Modify: sunshift/dashboard/src/app/page.tsx

**Verify:** `cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm dev` — manual submit valid/invalid/duplicate emails; `cat data/waitlist.json` shows persisted entries.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["sunshift/dashboard/src/app/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WaitlistCTA rendered between Pricing and Docs", "dev server: valid email produces success UI", "data/waitlist.json contains the entry", "second submit of same email shows 'already on the list'", "invalid email shows red error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Final verification + PR prep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run full local validation suite and open PR. Clean up stray artifacts.

**Files:** None modified — verification only.

**Verify:**
```
cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && pnpm lint
node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs
node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs
node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs
```
All green. Then: manual click-through checklist, then `gh pr create`.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd sunshift/dashboard && pnpm build && pnpm lint && node --test tests/landing-links.test.mjs && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-storage.test.mjs && node --import tsx --test tests/waitlist-route.test.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["pnpm build succeeds", "pnpm lint passes", "all 3 test files pass", "manual click-through checklist complete", "data/waitlist.json gitignored", "nav anchors work from /dashboard (original bug fixed)", "PR opened with summary referencing spec + plan"]}
```
